task_completion.description: Navigate to the Portal Notes creation screen in OpenSIS
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS web interface is visible, specifically displaying the form or page used to 'Add' or 'Create' a new Portal Note.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct title for the portal note
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Spring Science Fair' is visible inside the Title input field of the portal note form.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct body text for the portal note
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Registration for the annual Science Fair is now open. Please pick up forms from the main office by Friday.' is visible in the main body text area.

task_completion.description: Set the start date to today and end date to one month from today
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Start Date field shows the current date (today), and the End Date field shows a date exactly one month after the Start Date.

task_completion.description: Select Students and Parents as the target audience
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkboxes, toggles, or list selections for 'Students' and 'Parents' (or equivalent profile labels) are clearly checked or selected.

task_completion.description: Ensure Teachers and Admins are excluded from the audience
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkboxes, toggles, or list selections for 'Teachers' and 'Admins' are explicitly unchecked or left unselected.

task_completion.description: Save and publish the portal note
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the note was saved/published, or the newly created 'Spring Science Fair' note is visible in the system's list of active portal notes.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenSIS web interface to create the note
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OpenSIS application, not a terminal executing curl/SQL commands or a script.

integrity.description: The agent actually filled out the form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a logical progression of screenshots showing the form being filled out step-by-step, rather than the final state appearing instantaneously without intermediate steps.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI appears consistent with the standard OpenSIS interface, and there are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to modify the DOM text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Title: 'Spring Science Fair'. Expected Body: 'Registration for the annual Science Fair is now open. Please pick up forms from the main office by Friday.'. Target Audience: 'student' and 'parent' must be selected. Excluded Audience: 'teacher' and 'admin' must NOT be selected. Start date must be the current date, and End date must be exactly one month later.
